title: Large Baby Muslin Cloths - 100% Cotton Muslin Squares (Pack of 6, 70 x 70 cm) | Soft, Absorbent & Breathable | Perfect as Baby Bibs & Burp Cloths | Safari Collection
description: Product Description Muslin cloths for baby boys & girls by SWDL Baby Multi purpose muslin squares SWDL Baby muslin cloths are made from 100% cotton, offering softness and versatility for burping, managing reflux, and serving as bibs. 100% cotton. Giftable muslin cloths for baby boy or girl Our muslin squares are generously sized at 70 x 70 cm and are built to be highly durable. Their neutral design makes them perfect for both boys and girls. Pack of 6 Cotton Muslins SWDL Baby muslin cloths are available in a pack of 6, ensuring you have plenty on hand for their frequent use. We understand the importance of having enough muslin squares to keep your baby clean and comfortable. Absorbent large baby muslin cloths SWDL Baby muslin cloths are highly absorbent, crafted from premium-grade cotton material. See More
